title: Cat Bowls 304 Stainless Steel Heavy-Duty Pet Bowls, 3-Pack – 16cm Wide Anti-Whisker Fatigue Dog & Cat Dishes, Dishwasher Safe
features: Heavy-Duty 304 Stainless Steel:Crafted with food-grade 304 steel (1.2mm thick), cat food bowl resist rust, dents, and scratches. Ultra-smooth polish ensures easy cleaning and bacteria-free surfaces.
Wide Shallow Bowl Design:16cm (6.3") wide opening and 3cm (1.2") depth reduce whisker stress for cats and neck strain for dogs. Ideal for flat-faced breeds and sensitive eaters.
Dishwasher-Safe & Durable:Stainless steel repels stains and odors—effortlessly clean by hand or dishwasher. Reinforced base prevents tipping and scratches.
Lightweight & Stackable:Cat plate weighs only 90g (3.2oz)! Nestable design saves space for storage or travel—perfect for homes, camping, or multi-pet households.
Versatile for All Pets:Shallow cat bowl fits most elevated feeders (measure your stand first!). Great for dry/wet food, water, cats, dogs, rabbits, or senior pets. Shallow depth prevents overeating.
